sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n16607" key="a)strapo/plhktos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀστρᾰπό-πληκτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n16607.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lightning-stricken,</tr_> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀστερόπληκτος</ref> </xr> in Seneca <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">QN</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.15</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
